summary: TWO_COLUMN: unit square with BLUE vertical strip A (width P(A)), RED horizontal strip B (height P(B)), YELLOW intersection rectangle whose area = P(A)·P(B). Two ValueTrackers pA_tr, pB_tr sweep through 4 (P(A), P(B)) configurations via always_redraw. Live RIGHT panel shows P(A), P(B), and their product = yellow area.
